sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 0.1g of fat. saturated fat, cholesterol, and omega3 are doing most of the work. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole thing down.
sections.subtitleText: 0.1g of fat. saturated fat, cholesterol, and omega3 are doing most of the work. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole thing down.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: 5g of carbs. sugar and glycemic index matter most here. for a dairy food, this is doing the right stuff.
sections.subtitleText: 5g of carbs. sugar and glycemic index matter most here. for a dairy food, this is doing the right stuff.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: 3.4g of protein. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits here.
sections.subtitleText: 3.4g of protein. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits here.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin b12 at 20% daily value stands out most. that is only mild support overall.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin b12 at 20% daily value stands out most. that is only mild support overall.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: calcium at 10% daily value stands out most. useful, but still pretty limited.
sections.subtitleText: calcium at 10% daily value stands out most. useful, but still pretty limited.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: pros first: easy protein delivery for normal diets because dairy gets real credit for convenience. clear calcium identity because that is a core category strength. slots into meals very easily because practical versatility matters a lot for dairy.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side: not everyone tolerates dairy well because that is a real use-case limitation. fat quality varies wildly across dairy because some dairy is clean, some really is not. processing changes the category a lot because the label alone does not tell the whole story.

closing.summary: Skimmed Milk has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
